/usr/bin/g++ -O0 -g3 -fsanitize=address,undefined -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/api_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/login_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/sidebar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/dashboard_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/backtest_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/trading_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_client.dir/ui/risk_panel.cpp.o -o hf_client  ../libimgui.a ../libimplot.a /usr/lib64/libGLEW.so ../_deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.a -ldl /usr/lib64/libz.so ../libimgui.a /usr/lib64/libGLEW.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so ../_deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.a -lm
